name: Shachi, The Gluttony
description:
[[1/7]]

[[GLUTTONY]]

You wake up with an eldritch horror in your bedroom. Out of sheer loneliness you try and get a date with someone with a real physical appearance that's incomprehensible while keeping your mortal sanity intact!

May contain: blood, written hallucinations, eldritch girl

To start off.. there's a cool easter egg if you call her by her real name! How cute. (Shoggoth.)

Second, thank you for the support on the last bot, even though I was probably carried by the PFP being Don Quixatoke. Please, if you leave a review leave a genuine comment and don't leave it blank. I wanna improve my bots. ALSO ALSO could you leave uhh public chats!!
creator: MoinkLove
